summary: Post-FQ-15 authored-art run closes every current canonical block, inventory/live-drop, and live-enemy image gap and populates the live variety mechanisms. The repo now has 189 runtime PNGs: 71 blocks (20 canonicals; 17 three-entry pools), 43 canonical item/live-drop icons, 24 enemy sprites (six canonicals; six three-entry pools), 30 player sprites (ten canonicals; two alternate Looks each), and 21 unchanged structure/UI/background/wall assets. The run adds 117 net-new PNGs and replaces two human hue demos. Audit/runtime follow-through derives live enemy drops, limits Look choices to real pools, preserves opening frame semantics, restores generated player tones to exact rig palettes, and adds reusable normalizer/contact/verifier tooling. Strict audit is clean; pixel verifier passes 186 applicable PNGs; repo validator and capsule doctor pass; isolated Godot smoke passes 306/306 with every alternate Look recoloring; nine rendered tour frames and final contacts pass visual review. Generic player gear, final UI replacement art, and optional opening cels remain deliberately deferred. Changes are signable but uncommitted for operator review; no push performed.
scope: Current live sprite/image coverage and authored variation after FQ-15; no future enemy/system art, generic gear overlays, UI redesign, or opening-cel program.
next_action: Operator reviews the final contacts/runtime capture and chooses whether to commit this signable pass or scope a body-specific player-gear alignment matrix.
